_doc: Expected ManualImport command body Curator POSTs to /api/v1/command for the importable files ONLY (ids 101+102 from get_mapping.json; the rejected 103 is filtered out). importMode casing + the files[] envelope are [ASSUMED] pending the 04-05 live DevTools capture (A1) — when pinned, update this ONE fixture, not every test. importMode=Move triggers the atomic hardlink within /data (D-09).
